description_long: This sculpture depicts an angelic figure with large, detailed wings, standing beside a smaller, draped human figure, possibly a child. The angel is shown with one arm raised, index finger pointing upward, while the other arm gently guides the smaller figure. Both figures are dressed in flowing, classical robes with intricate folds and realistic drapery. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular base, with additional decorative elements at the feet, including a small, indistinct object. The surface has a weathered, patinated appearance, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The overall composition conveys a sense of protection, guidance, and upward aspiration.
description: A detailed bronze sculpture of an angel with outstretched wings guiding a smaller human figure, both in flowing robes, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the angel's face, raised arm, and the smaller figure looking up, with both figures' robes and wings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the wings, the angel's profile, and the overlapping figures' drapery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the angel's wings, the backs of both figures, and the layered folds of their garments.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angel's arm raised and the smaller figure's profile, with the wings extending backward.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
